/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/IR.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/IR.dir/src/IO/bin_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/IR.dir/src/console.c.o CMakeFiles/IR.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/IR.dir/src/IO/one_timer_IO.c.o CMakeFiles/IR.dir/src/utils/reverse_word.c.o CMakeFiles/IR.dir/src/queryparser.c.o CMakeFiles/IR.dir/src/utils/stack.c.o CMakeFiles/IR.dir/src/IO/reduced_one_timer_IO.c.o CMakeFiles/IR.dir/src/utils/encoder_decoder.c.o CMakeFiles/IR.dir/src/test.c.o CMakeFiles/IR.dir/src/gui.c.o -o IR  -lm -lgtk-4 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lvulkan -lgraphene-1.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -ladwaita-1 -lgtk-4 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lvulkan -lgraphene-1.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -ladwaita-1
